conversation_history.content: Hello! To assist you with your loan, could you please provide your Monthly Income, Existing EMI, Down Payment, and Loan Tenure (in years or months)?
monthly income 1 lakh, emi 20k, down payment 3 lakh, tenure 60

I've extracted the following information: Monthly Income: ₹1,00,000, Existing EMI: ₹20,000, Down Payment: ₹3,00,000, and Loan Tenure: 60 months (which is 5 years). Let me know if there's anything else you would like to add or clarify!
